hero.intro: I build reliable web systems for government and enterprise. Currently based in Indonesia, crafting solutions with Laravel and Vue.js.
about.title: About
about.p1: I'm Rahmat Hidayat — a software engineer who believes that good software is invisible. It just works, reliably, at scale, without getting in the way.
about.p2: With years of experience building full-stack web applications, I specialize in turning complex requirements into clean, maintainable systems. My work spans government platforms, enterprise tools, and modern web applications.
about.p3: When I'm not writing code, I'm thinking about architecture, exploring new technologies, or contributing to the developer community.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work from government systems, enterprise tools, and personal experiments.
services.title: Services
services.subtitle: I help organizations build and improve their digital systems.
services.fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
services.fullstack.desc: End-to-end web application development with Laravel, Vue.js, and modern tooling. From database design to responsive interfaces.
services.architecture.title: System Architecture
services.architecture.desc: Designing scalable, maintainable system architectures. Database optimization, API design, and infrastructure planning.
services.consultation.title: Technical Consultation
services.consultation.desc: Code review, performance audits, and technical strategy for existing applications. Identifying bottlenecks and modernization paths.
services.legacy.title: Legacy Modernization
services.legacy.desc: Migrating and modernizing legacy systems incrementally. Strangler pattern adoption, framework upgrades, and dependency management.
resume.title: Resume
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hello? Reach out.
